organization.name: Church of St Jude (Wexford) Deacons Pantry

requirements.documents_required: When you are called to our registration table, you will need to provide identification for each person for whom you are requesting food.
requirements.eligibility: Catchment Area - Hwy 401 (north) to Eglinton Ave E (south), Don Valley Pkwy (west) to Birchmount Rd (east)
requirements.accessibility_info: Designated parking at entrance; Wheelchair accessible main entrance; Barrier-free washroom
